chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-368 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.1819/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection 3. For hearing of CMA No.1820/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of CMA No.182/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 27.03.2025 Syed Nadeem Haider Shah, Advocate for the petitioner.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgent Application is granted. 2 to5. Case of the petitioner is that he issued four cheques in connection with some agreement and two of the cheques were dishonored, for which, the FIRs were registered. However, he seeking directions against the police officials not to register another FIR in respect of other cheques. Perusal of record reflects that suit for Declaration, Specific Performance of Contract, Cancellation, Damages and Permanent Injunction, was filed which is pending before the Court of Senior Civil Judge, Daharki wherein police officials are also party. Under the circumstances petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed in limine. However, petitioner is at liberty to approach the concerned Civil Court, for redressal of his grievance. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
